# data/current

This folder is **auto-generated** by `app/extract_events.py`. It always
mirrors the newest dated snapshot so external tools can rely on stable,
unchanging raw URLs.

- Mirrors: [`data/2026-06-02/`](../2026-06-02/)
- Regenerated whenever the newest snapshot is (re-)extracted.

**Do not edit these files by hand.** If you need a fixed version, link to
the dated folder instead of this one.
